debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝⁹ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝⁶ : ChartedSpace H M
m : IsManifold I (↑⊤) M
hI : I.Boundaryless
E' : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E'
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E'
inst✝³ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E'
H' : Type u_5
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace H'
I' : ModelWithCorners ℝ E' H'
N : Type u_6
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace N
inst✝ : ChartedSpace H' N
m' : IsManifold I' (↑⊤) N
f : M → N
s : Set M
hs : IsOpen s
x✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace M := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ H inst✝⁸ I M inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ m
x✝ : DiffeologicalSpace N := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E' inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ H' inst✝² I' N inst✝¹ inst✝ m'
hf : DSmooth (s.restrict f)
x : M
hxs : x ∈ s
⊢ ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (↑⊤) f s x

failed_attempts:
have hxint : extChartAt I x x ∈ interior (extChartAt I x).target :=
    I.isInteriorPoint_iff.1 (BoundarylessManifold.isInteriorPoint (x := x))
  have hxs_pre : extChartAt I x x ∈ (extChartAt I x).target ∩ (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s :=
    ⟨(extChartAt I x).map_source (mem_extChartAt_source x),
     by show (extChartAt I x).symm (extChartAt I x x) ∈ s
        rw [(extChartAt I x).left_inv (mem_extChartAt_source x)]; exact hxs⟩
  have hU_open : IsOpen ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s) :=
    (continuousOn_extChartAt_symm x).isOpen_inter_preimage (isOpen_extChartAt_target x) hs
  have hU_nhds : interior (extChartAt I x).target ∩
      ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s) ∈ nhds (extChartAt I x x) :=
    Filter.inter_mem (isOpen_interior.mem_nhds hxint) (hU_open.mem_nhds hxs_pre)
  have ⟨ε, hε, hε'⟩ := (Metric.mem_nhds_iff (x := x')).1 <|
    toEuclidean.isOpenMap.image_mem_nhds hU_nhds
  -- Construct local parametrization e (as in DSmooth.contMDiff)
  let e := (extChartAt I x).symm ∘ toEuclidean.symm ∘
    (univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl)
  -- e maps into extChartAt target
  have he_mem : ∀ y, toEuclidean.symm ((univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl) y) ∈
      (extChartAt I x).target := fun y ↦ by
    have hmem := hε' ((univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl).map_source (mem_univ y))
    rw [mem_image] at hmem; obtain ⟨z, hz, hzy⟩ := hmem
    rw [←hzy, toEuclidean.symm_apply_apply]; exact interior_subset hz.1
  -- e is ContMDiff
  have he : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I ∞ e := (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).comp_contMDiff
    (toEuclidean.symm.contDiff.comp <| (contDiff_unitBallBall hε).comp
    contDiff_univUnitBall).contMDiff he_mem
  -- e maps into s
  have he_s : ∀ y, e y ∈ s := fun y ↦ by
    have hmem := hε' ((univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl).map_source (mem_univ y))
    rw [mem_image] at hmem; obtain ⟨z, hz, hzy⟩ := hmem
    have : (extChartAt I x).symm (toEuclidean.symm
        ((univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl) y)) ∈ s := by
      rw [←hzy, toEuclidean.symm_apply_apply]; exact hz.2.2
    exact this
  -- Lift e to a map into s, use hf to get f ∘ e is ContMDiff
  have hfe : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ (f ∘ e) :=
    hf n (fun y ↦ ⟨e y, he_s y⟩) (isPlot_induced_iff.2 he)
  -- Local inverse (same as DSmooth.contMDiff)
  let e' := (univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl).symm ∘ toEuclidean ∘ extChartAt I x
  have he' : ContMDiffOn I (𝓡 n) ∞ e' _ :=
    (contDiffOn_univUnitBall_symm.comp (contDiff_unitBallBall_symm hε).contDiffOn fun _ hx'' ↦
        mem_preimage.2 ((unitBallBall x' ε hε).symm.map_source hx'')).contMDiffOn.comp
      (toEuclidean.contDiff.contMDiff.comp_contMDiffOn <| contMDiffOn_extChartAt.mono <|
        inter_subset_right) inter_subset_left
  refine (((hfe).comp_contMDiffOn he').congr (fun x'' hx'' ↦ ?_) x ?_).contMDiffAt ?_
  · simp_rw [e,e',Function.comp_apply]
    rw [(univUnitBall.trans' (unitBallBall x' ε hε) rfl).right_inv (by exact hx''.1),
      toEuclidean.symm_apply_apply,(extChartAt I x).left_inv (extChartAt_source I x ▸ hx''.2)]
  · exact ⟨Metric.mem_ball_self hε,mem_chart_source H x⟩
  · refine IsOpen.mem_nhds ?_ ⟨Metric.mem_ball_self hε,mem_chart_source H x⟩
    exact inter_comm _ _ ▸ extChartAt_source I x ▸ ContinuousOn.isOpen_inter_preimage
      (toEuclidean.continuous.comp_continuousOn (continuousOn_extChartAt x))
      (isOpen_extChartAt_source x) Metric.isOpen_ball
